parameters.name: SelectedDataType
parameters.label: Selected Data Type
parameters.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize by DataType
| order by DataType asc

typeSettings.noItemsMessage: No data types found in selected time range

parameters.name: SelectedVendor
parameters.label: Selected Vendor
parameters.query:
union DeviceFileEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceProcessEvents,
      DeviceRegistryEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents, DeviceEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Microsoft'
    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
    and isnotempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)
| summarize by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName
| order by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName asc

typeSettings.noItemsMessage: No third-party vendors found in selected time range

content.json: MDE Top 6 tables. Select a tab above to explore ingestion volumes by data type/vendor. Click any row in a summary table to see daily trends and export data using the **⬇ Download** icon that appears in the table header. Email jobarbar@microsoft.com for any issues.

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| summarize Ingestion_GB=sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), DataType

content.json:
### Sentinel Ingestion
Click a **DataType** row to see daily trend below.

content.query:
let TotalGB = toscalar(Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| summarize sum(Quantity)/1024);
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| summarize Total_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2), Daily_Avg_GB=round(avg(Quantity)/1024,2), Peak_Day_GB=round(max(Quantity)/1024,2), Days_Active=dcount(bin(TimeGenerated,1d)) by DataType
| extend Pct_of_Total=round(Total_GB / TotalGB * 100, 1)
| extend Monthly_Proj_GB=round(Daily_Avg_GB * 30, 2)
| project DataType, Total_GB, Pct_of_Total, Daily_Avg_GB, Monthly_Proj_GB, Peak_Day_GB, Days_Active
| order by Total_GB desc
content.title: Data Types — Ranked by Total GB

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2) by Day=bin(TimeGenerated,1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Daily Ingestion Trend — {SelectedDataType}

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,3) by Day=bin(TimeGenerated,1d)
| order by Day desc
content.title: Daily Ingestion Detail — {SelectedDataType} (exportable)

content.query:
Usage
| where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents')
| summarize Ingestion_GB=sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), DataType

content.json:
### Device Tables Breakout
Click a **DataType** row to see daily trend below.

content.query:
let TotalDeviceGB = toscalar(Usage
| where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents')
| summarize sum(Quantity)/1024);
Usage
| where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents')
| summarize Total_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2), Daily_Avg_GB=round(avg(Quantity)/1024,2), Peak_Day_GB=round(max(Quantity)/1024,2), Days_Active=dcount(bin(TimeGenerated,1d)) by DataType
| extend Pct_of_Device_Total=round(Total_GB / TotalDeviceGB * 100, 1)
| extend Monthly_Proj_GB=round(Daily_Avg_GB * 30, 2)
| project DataType, Total_GB, Pct_of_Device_Total, Daily_Avg_GB, Monthly_Proj_GB, Peak_Day_GB, Days_Active
| order by Total_GB desc
content.title: Data Types — Ranked by Total GB

content.query:
Usage
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2) by Day=bin(TimeGenerated,1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Daily Ingestion Trend — {SelectedDataType}

content.query:
Usage
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,3) by Day=bin(TimeGenerated,1d)
| order by Day desc
content.title: Daily Ingestion Detail — {SelectedDataType} (exportable)

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType !startswith 'Device'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), DataType

content.json:
### Non-Device Ingestion
Click a **DataType** row to see daily trend below.

content.query:
let TotalNonDeviceGB = toscalar(Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType !startswith 'Device'
| summarize sum(Quantity)/1024);
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType !startswith 'Device'
| summarize Total_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2), Daily_Avg_GB=round(avg(Quantity)/1024,2), Peak_Day_GB=round(max(Quantity)/1024,2), Days_Active=dcount(bin(TimeGenerated,1d)) by DataType
| extend Pct_of_NonDevice_Total=round(Total_GB / TotalNonDeviceGB * 100, 1)
| extend Monthly_Proj_GB=round(Daily_Avg_GB * 30, 2)
| project DataType, Total_GB, Pct_of_NonDevice_Total, Daily_Avg_GB, Monthly_Proj_GB, Peak_Day_GB, Days_Active
| order by Total_GB desc
content.title: Data Types — Ranked by Total GB

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2) by Day=bin(TimeGenerated,1d)

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable==true

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Microsoft'
    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
    and isnotempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)
| summarize EventCount=count() by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

content.json:
#### 🔧 Transform Quick Reference — Filtering Fields for Ingestion Transforms
Use these three fields from the drilldown tables below to build workspace transforms that drop noisy events:

| # | Field | Scope | Example KQL Filter |
|---|-------|-------|--------------------|
| 1 | **InitiatingProcessFolderPath** | Drops all events from a specific installed application path | `where InitiatingProcessFolderPath !contains "C:\\Program Files\\NoisyApp"` |
| 2 | **InitiatingProcessFileName** | More targeted — drops events from a specific executable regardless of install location | `where InitiatingProcessFileName != "noisyagent.exe"` |
| 3 | **InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName** | Broadest — drops everything from an entire vendor | `where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName != "Noisy Vendor Inc."` |

> **Tip:** Click a vendor row, then use the *Process Detail* table to identify the exact values to plug into your transform.

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Microsoft'
    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
    and isnotempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)
| summarize EventCount=count(), UniqueDevices=dcount(DeviceName), UniqueFiles=dcount(FileName), TotalFileSize_MB=round(sum(tolong(FileSize))/1048576.0,2) by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Click a vendor row to drill down  ▼

content.json:
---
### Drilldown: **{SelectedVendor}** — DeviceFileEvents
Detailed process info, file descriptions, paths, sizes, and device context for spike investigation.

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName == '{SelectedVendor}'
| summarize
    EventCount=count(),
    UniqueDevices=dcount(DeviceName),
    AvgFileSize_KB=round(avg(tolong(FileSize))/1024.0,2),
    TotalFileSize_MB=round(sum(tolong(FileSize))/1048576.0,2),
    UniqueTargetFiles=dcount(FileName),
    UniqueTargetPaths=dcount(FolderPath)
    by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName,
       InitiatingProcessVersionInfoProductName,
       InitiatingProcessVersionInfoFileDescription,
       InitiatingProcessVersionInfoInternalFileName,
       InitiatingProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName,
       InitiatingProcessFileName,
       InitiatingProcessFolderPath
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Process Detail — {SelectedVendor} (DeviceFileEvents)

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName == '{SelectedVendor}'
| summarize EventCount=count(), UniqueDevices=dcount(DeviceName), UniqueFiles=dcount(FileName) by ActionType
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Action Types — {SelectedVendor} (DeviceFileEvents)

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName == '{SelectedVendor}'
| summarize EventCount=count(), UniqueProcesses=dcount(InitiatingProcessFileName) by DeviceName
| order by EventCount desc
| take 50
content.title: Top 50 Devices — {SelectedVendor} (DeviceFileEvents)

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName == '{SelectedVendor}'
| summarize EventCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Daily Event Trend — {SelectedVendor} (DeviceFileEvents)
